title: Integration of Science, Education, and Industry: High steps for Future Innovation
author: Navruzova Gulrukh Uktamovna  teacher of Asia International University
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article addresses a critical shift in the relationship between education, science, and production as society transitions from an industrial to a post-industrial framework. The theoretical comprehension of integration suggests a focus on how these domains interconnect and influence each other.
steps_raw: The article addresses a critical shift in the relationship between education, science, and production as society transitions from an industrial to a post-industrial framework. The theoretical comprehension of integration suggests a focus on how these domains interconnect and influence each other.
